title: anagallis parviflora var. micrantha
intro: Anagallis parviflora var. micrantha, also known as the Small-flowered Pimpernel or Dwarf Pimpernel, is a variety of flowering plant in the primrose family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anagallis parviflora var. micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Anagallis parviflora var. micrantha is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and can be used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, fever, and skin conditions.
